sections.heading: Admin Service API Surface (contact360.io/admin)
sections.prose: Django web app + DRF for operator workflows (HTML + JSON). Not the Next.js dashboard; pairs with DocsAI and internal tooling.

sections.heading: Runtime
sections.prose: - Django web app + DRF API gateway for operator workflows.

items.text: Django web app + DRF API gateway for operator workflows.

sections.heading: Core route categories
sections.prose:
- Web auth/session routes (`/`, `/login`, `/logout`).
- Role-gated admin routes (billing, users, logs, jobs, storage, settings).
- API v1 health/status routes (`/api/v1/health*`).

items.text: Role-gated admin routes (billing, users, logs, jobs, storage, settings).

sections.heading: Integration clients
sections.prose:
| Client | Purpose | More detail |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Appointment360 GraphQL | Operator actions that mirror product API | [appointment360.api.md](appointment360.api.md) |
| logs.api | Log search / audit | [logsapi.api.md](logsapi.api.md) |
| Gateway jobs / satellites | Job visibility via GraphQL + workers | [jobs.api.md](jobs.api.md) |
| s3storage | Object and storage ops | [s3storage.api.md](s3storage.api.md) |

rows: Operator actions that mirror product API

sections.heading: Operator flow (simplified)
sections.prose:
```mermaid
flowchart LR
  A[Admin browser]
  D[Django + DRF]
  G[appointment360]
  L[logs.api]
  J[jobs]
  S[s3storage]
  A --> D
  D --> G
  D --> L
  D --> J
  D --> S
```

sections.heading: Governance notes
sections.prose:
- Super-admin and admin role boundaries must be enforced at middleware + decorator levels.
- Destructive operations require idempotency and immutable audit trails.

items.text: Super-admin and admin role boundaries must be enforced at middleware + decorator levels.
Destructive operations require idempotency and immutable audit trails.
